name: GatewayNetwork
description: The network settings for a gateway.

allOf.description: A unique IP address range to use for this network. These IP addresses should be in the form of a Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR) block; for example, 10.0.0.0/16.
The name of the network. This name is used to reference the network and must be unique among networks in this gateway.
